title: Facilities - Assigning menus for specific areas and times
workflow_title: Facilities - Assigning menus for specific areas and times

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, open General and go to Facilities.
Click the pencil icon to open the facility you want to configure.
Choose whether this applies to the POS or to Self-service (QR, Kiosk).
At Period, select the time period you added earlier - you can add multiple time periods.
At Menu, select the menu that should be enabled.
Press + Add to add the menu assignment.
Finally, go to General, then the sub-category General, and click Send to transmit the changes.
